assessment: Batched calibration/prediction removed the previous one-row post-checkpoint hang: 320k/5k bounded run finished with exit_code=0 in about 566.8 seconds.
No-button FPR is within the user gate on the 5k temporal prefix, but this is not sufficient because keyboard accuracy and mouse-button F1 are both zero.
Mouse-button semantic diagnostic still has zero exact and semantic overlap, so button timing/type semantics remain unresolved.
This branch remains FDM-1-recipe-shaped infrastructure/negative evidence, not a paper-target win.
next_recipe_faithful_actions: Replace compact hand-crafted luma summaries with a stronger video encoder/tokenizer pretraining path aligned with FDM-1 screen-video token compression.
Add explicit masked action-token diffusion over press/release transition spans instead of independent button-class collapse.
Keep batched inference/calibration as the default for all future prefix/full H200 probes.
